assertions.description: Caption leads with the key finding, not 'this chart shows...' and includes exact figures
Data source is named in or directly after the caption
If alt-text is requested, it includes chart type, both axes, data range, and key finding

assertion_results.note: Caption leads with 'Technology sector leads...' not 'This chart shows'
Source: National Labor Statistics Bureau named
Alt-text includes chart type (horizontal bar), both axes, range, finding
Leads with 'Health spending exceeds education and defence combined'
Leads with Romania's 38% rural vs 91% urban gap finding
Alt-text includes grouped bar chart type, country axis, percentage axis, 2020-2025 range

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
